<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of sebastian/object-reflector. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace SebastianBergmann\ObjectReflector; use function count; use function explode; final class ObjectReflector { /** * @return array<string, mixed> */ public function getProperties(object $object): array { $properties = []; $className = $object::class; foreach ((array) $object as $name => $value) { $name = explode("\0", (string) $name); if (count($name) === 1) { $name = $name[0]; } elseif ($name[1] !== $className) { $name = $name[1] . '::' . $name[2]; } else { $name = $name[2]; } $properties[$name] = $value; } return $properties; } }
